_note: Post-optimization measurement after superinstruction (v20.2.0). tight_loop measured on dev machine (Win11, release build). Other metrics carried over from v20.0.0.json (unaffected by superinstructions). record_transform_1m_ms not measured (benchmark file uses undefined generate_rows; fix planned for v20.3.0+).

comparison_vs_v20_0_0._note: v20.0.0 baseline (85ms) was a theoretical CI estimate, not a real measurement. Both values below are real dev-machine measurements. For fair CI-level comparison, re-run benchmarks on the same machine with v20.0.0 binary.
